scripts.build: ./zig/zig build codegen && ./zig/zig build scan -- ts/handlers/ --manifest=generated/manifest.json && tsx adapters/typescript.ts generated/manifest.json generated/dispatch.generated.ts
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently 'tsx generated/dispatch.generated.ts /tmp/tiger-web.sock' 'sleep 1 && ./zig/zig build run -- --sidecar=/tmp/tiger-web.sock'
